ticket.title: The KB content repo: scaffold, CI pipeline, and ingestion PLAN
ticket.description: Stand up the KB content repo: the raw -> processed -> production ingestion pipeline, knowledge-lint validation rules, KG entity templates, and a CI gate. Plan the ingestion shape before building.

candidate_memory.link_reason: why the KB exists at all

code_agent.rationale: code_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision/project context; release/workspace is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Beta goal: first 100 users', 'Company Research Agent build' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

qa_agent.rationale: qa_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision context; project/workspace is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'Company Research Agent build', 'a linked ticket Executable Launch Plan' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

design_agent.rationale: design_agent keeps the in-scope decision/project context; codebase/release is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'CONVENTIONS.md — input revalidation (Convention 9)' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

product_agent.rationale: product_agent keeps the in-scope decision/project/release context; codebase is out of scope, rejected entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'CONVENTIONS.md — input revalidation (Convention 9)' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

human_teammate.rationale: Robin (the baseline owner) sees the current team entries plus their own local note.
